THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_FAITH.title: Book of Faith
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_FAITH.description: At the start of combat, add 3 [gold]Smites[/gold] to your hand.
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.title: Book of Ornithology
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.descript:
At the start of combat, add 3 [gold]Smites+[/gold] to your hand.
Your [gold]Smites[/gold] deal +2 damage.
THEVALKYRIE-BOOK_OF_ORNITHOLOGY.flavor: Its true visage has been revealed!
THEVALKYRIE-FEATHERED_HELMET.title: Feathered Helmet
THEVALKYRIE-FEATHERED_HELMET.flavor: Mazaleth's cultists typically aren't warriors, but there are always exceptions. Though you're not a cultist, are you...?
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.title: Mystic Matchbox
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.description:
[purple]Enchanted[/purple] Attacks deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] additional damage.
[purple]Enchanted[/purple] cards grant [blue]{Block}[/blue] additional [gold]Block[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-MYSTIC_MATCHBOX.flavor: Proper lighters are rare down there.
THEVALKYRIE-BLOODIED_TITHE.title: Bloodied Tithe
THEVALKYRIE-BLOODIED_TITHE.description: Whenever you apply [gold]Bleed[/gold] on an enemy with no [gold]Bleed[/gold], apply an additional [blue]{BleedPower}[/blue] [gold]Bleed[/gold].
THEVALKYRIE-FISHING_HOOK.title: Fishing Hook
THEVALKYRIE-FISHING_HOOK.flavor: It brings to mind memories of dried kelp.
